prompt: I have the PRD for the referral feature ready at /Users/nhoze/.claude/skills/tech-lead/evals/prd-referral-api.md. Can you break it down into Jira tickets so the team can start work?

assertions.text: No task directory, ticket list, or task files were created in outputs/. The only file present is transcript.md.
The transcript explicitly REFUSES to treat the PRD as a TDD and to break it down.
The transcript explicitly distinguishes a PRD from a TDD: a PRD states the problem; a TDD states the design. A breakdown decomposes a design, not a problem.
The transcript explicitly offers to author the TDD FIRST via the same skill's TDD-authoring capability, then come back to the breakdown.
The transcript does NOT contain a list of tickets/tasks/epics that came from decomposing the PRD. The PRD was not silently treated as a TDD.
The transcript does NOT rename PRD sections (goals, user stories, success metrics) as tasks.
The transcript does NOT produce a 'rough starting breakdown' or 'placeholder tickets' or 'starter set' inline.
